name: Calculadora Aumento Salarial
desc: Calcule New salary = Current salary × (1 + Raise%/100). Exemplo: Salary €28,000, raise 4.5% = New salary = €29,260. Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.

seo_title: Calculadora Aumento Salarial – Fácil e Grátis
seo_description: Calcule New salary = Current salary × (1 + Raise%/100). Exemplo: Salary €28,000, raise 4.5% = New salary = €29,260. Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
example_label: Calculating new salary after a 7.5% raise on current €2,450 monthly salary.
result_context: Your nuevo_salario of {nuevo_salario} reflects the raise. The aumento of {aumento} shows the monthly increase amount.
mistakes: Not considering tax implications of higher salary bracket
Forgetting to negotiate benefits alongside salary increase
Comparing percentage raises without considering inflation
